resources.string: This will notify the admin and share your current location.
Round Trip: Bus service both ways (Home to School and School to Home).
Morning Only: Bus picks up at home. Parent picks up from school.
Afternoon Only: Parent drops off at school. Bus brings child home.
Not Riding: Temporary cancellation (e.g., vacation or private transport).
How do I track my child\'s bus in real-time?
Navigate to the Home screen and tap on your child\'s profile. If the bus is currently on a trip, a map will appear showing the bus\'s live location and its estimated time of arrival at your stop.
Why am I not receiving push notifications?

Please check that notifications are enabled in your phone settings for the BusWatch app. Also, ensure that the specific alerts you want are enabled in the \"Notification Preference\" section of the Settings screen.
How do I change my home or pickup location?

You can request an address change through the Student Details page. Tap \"Request Edit\" on the address field. Note that changes require admin approval and may take up to 30 days to re-enable after a successful update.
What should I do if the bus is late?
The app provides real-time tracking so you can see exactly where the bus is. If there is a major delay, the driver or admin will send a notification. You can monitor the live ETA on the map.
Yes, your data is stored securely using Firebase. Only authorized personnel, such as administrators and the specific driver assigned to your child\'s route, can access necessary information.
For any technical issues or inquiries, please email us at buswatch@gmail.com. We aim to respond to all queries within 24 hours.
How do I add another child to my account?
In the side menu or Home screen, tap \"Add Child\" and fill out the enrollment form. You will need to provide school details and upload a photo for identification.
What is the SOS button for?
The SOS feature is for emergency use only. When a driver triggers an SOS, it immediately notifies administrators and parents of children currently on board with the bus\'s coordinates.
The ETA is calculated based on the bus\'s current GPS speed, the remaining distance to your stop, and average traffic conditions along the route.
Can I update my own profile photo?
Yes, you can update your profile information and photo in the \"Parent Details\" section accessible from the side menu.
What happens if my child misses the bus?
If your child misses the bus, yes they will need to go to another transportation, and the driver or conductor will mark them as not riding.
Can I choose or switch my bus driver?
No, because the admin decide who will be your driver. If you want to switch driver, please contact the admin at buswatch@gmail.com.
Does the app work without internet?
No, real-time tracking and notifications require a stable internet connection (Mobile Data or Wi-Fi) to receive updates from our servers.
Why is the bus icon not moving on the map?
If the icon is stationary, the bus might be stopped at a traffic light, a designated stop, or there may be a temporary GPS signal loss. If it persists, check for delay notifications.
How do I reset my password?
You can change your password while logged in via Settings -> Security. If you forgot your password, use the \"Forgot Password\" link on the login screen.
Routes are managed by the school transportation administrators. They assign drivers and buses to specific routes and stops based on student enrollment.
Is there a cost to use the app?
The app is provided as a service by your school or transportation provider. Check with them to see if any fees are included in your transportation package.
Can I use the app on multiple devices?
Yes, you can log in with your account on multiple smartphones. Your settings and child profiles will stay synced.
What should I do if the app crashes?

If the app crashes, try clearing the cache in your phone settings or reinstalling the app. Since this is a school project and not yet on the Play Store, ensure you have the latest version from our Google Drive link.
How do I delete my account?
To delete your account and remove all personal data, go to Settings -> Security and tap \"Delete Account\". You will need to wait for a 10-second confirmation timer and type DELETE to proceed.
What if my child leaves an item on the bus?
If your child leaves something behind, please contact the bus driver or the school transport office immediately via the support email or phone number provided.
How do I change the app language?
Go to Settings -> General and tap on \"Preferred Language\". Currently, we support English, with more languages coming soon.
Can I see my child\'s boarding history?
Currently, the app focuses on real-time tracking. We are working on a \"History\" feature that will allow you to see past boarding and arrival times in a future update.
How do I log out of the app?
You can log out by scrolling to the bottom of the Settings screen and tapping the \"LOGOUT\" button.
How do I know if the bus is near my stop?
Enable the \"Bus Near Stop\" notification in Settings. The app will send you an alert when the bus is within a specific radius of your designated pickup or drop-off point.
Can both parents track the same child?
Yes, both parents can log in using the same account credentials or separate accounts linked to the same student profile (if enabled by your school).
What happens during school holidays or breaks?
Bus tracking is only active during scheduled school days. During holidays, the map will show no active trips, and notifications will be paused.
How do I update my child\'s grade or section?
You can update these details in the Student profile section. Some changes may require administrative review before appearing in the app.
Does the app use a lot of battery?
The app is optimized for low power consumption. It only uses GPS and high data frequency while you are actively tracking a bus on the map.
Is the bus location updated every second?
The location is typically updated every 5 to 10 seconds to balance real-time accuracy with battery and data efficiency.
Know exactly where your child’s bus is at all times. Our real-time GPS tracking provides peace of mind with accurate updates.
Your child’s safety is our top priority. Our app uses secure technology to protect your data and ensure a safe journey.
By allowing access bus tracking app finds your location and provides you with best rides
Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.
Password must contain at least 8 characters, including 1 capital letter and 1 number.
I agree to the Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy
Please agree to the Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy to continue
Temporary route change due to road construction on Main Street
When the bus is near the student\'s stop
The bus is approaching your stop. Please be ready!
Are you sure you want to mark all notifications as read?
Are you sure you want to delete %1$d notifications? This action cannot be undone.
When the driver starts the trip
When the bus arrives at school or drops off at the stop
When your child boards the bus
This action is irreversible. Please wait %1$d seconds and type DELETE below to confirm.
Your account has been deleted. Redirecting...

Terms and Conditions for BusWatch

Welcome to BusWatch. By using this application, you agree to the following terms and conditions connected to our student transportation tracking system:

1. Real-Time Tracking
BusWatch provides real-time GPS tracking of school buses. This data is provided for the safety and convenience of parents and guardians. You agree to use this information solely for tracking your child\'s commute.

2. User Responsibilities
- You must provide accurate information during registration, including your home address and emergency contacts.
- You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
- You agree to notify the school or transport administrator immediately of any changes to your child\'s transportation needs.

3. Safety and SOS Alerts
The SOS alert feature is intended for emergency use only. When triggered by a driver, an immediate notification will be sent to administrators and the parents of students currently on board. Misuse of the SOS system may lead to account suspension.

4. Data Privacy
Your data, including location and child profiles, is stored securely using Firebase and Cloudinary services. We only collect data necessary for the operation of the BusWatch system.

5. System Limitations
While we strive for 100% accuracy, GPS tracking depends on network availability and satellite signals. BusWatch is not liable for minor delays or temporary signal losses.

6. Account Approval
All parent accounts are subject to administrative approval to ensure student safety. Access to the system is granted only after verification.

By continuing to use BusWatch, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these terms.

Last Updated: May 2, 2026

Privacy Policy for BusWatch

Welcome to BusWatch. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy.

1. Location Data:
We collect the bus\'s real-time location and your child\'s boarding status to provide accurate tracking. Your home location is used to calculate estimated arrival times and stop proximity alerts. This data is essential for the core functionality of the safety tracking system.

2. Personal & Medical Information:
Names, phone numbers, and child profile details (including photos) are used for identification and emergency contact purposes. To ensure safety during transit, we collect optional medical information such as blood type, allergies, medications, and medical conditions. This sensitive data is only visible to authorized drivers and administrators assigned to your route.

3. Emergency SOS Alerts:
When an SOS alert is triggered by a driver, the system captures the bus\'s exact coordinates and immediately notifies relevant parents and administrators. This emergency data is prioritized to ensure rapid response and child safety.

4. Security & Storage:
We use Firebase Authentication for secure logins and Firestore for encrypted data storage. Child photos are stored securely via Cloudinary. Access to sensitive data is restricted to authorized personnel based on secure role-based permissions.

5. Third-Party Services:
BusWatch utilizes Google Play Services (Maps & Location) and OsmDroid to provide mapping features. These services handle location data according to their respective privacy policies.

6. Contact Us:
If you have questions about this policy, or if you wish to exercise your rights regarding your data, please contact our support team at:
Email: buswatch@gmail.com

Last Updated: May 2, 2026
Make sure the pin is placed at the exact home location
Are you sure you want to change home address?
Changing your home location will require admin approval before it takes effect. Requests are typically processed during the weekly schedule update.

Your request has been successfully submitted! Please note that it will take 30 days before you can change your Home Address again. The admin reviews requests on a weekly basis, so it might take a long time for approval.

Your request has been successfully submitted! Please note that it will take 30 days before you can change your Pickup Stop again. The admin reviews requests on a weekly basis, so it might take a long time for approval.
Your home location change is pending admin approval
Are you sure you want to request a change to this pickup location? This requires admin approval.
Choose a new stop. This request will be sent to the admin for approval.
Choose the nearest stop for your child. This will finalize their pickup point.
Tap a marker on the map
Do you want to assign \'%1$s\' as the pickup stop?
Are you sure you want to request a change to \'%1$s\'? This requires admin approval.
Change request submitted for admin approval
Are you sure you want to restore this user to active status?
Are you sure you want to permanently delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
Names cannot contain numbers or special characters
Please fill in all required fields
Please enter a valid %1$d-digit phone number
Age under 3 is unusually young for school transport.
Registration for this age will be monitored by an administrator. Please proceed with caution.
Age 21 and above are restricted from registration.
